summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) Task explicitly requires TDD + tests via `bun test`; workflow references `tests/cleanup.test.ts` and `tests/workflow.test.ts` but neither file is provided. (2) Workflow runs 4 test cases but all fixture files (fixtures/case{1-4}-*.json) are missing; workflow will fail immediately at file read. (3) No `package.json` provided; `bun install` will fail. (4) Action `oven-sh/setup-bun@v2` not pinned to SHA (violation of workflow best practice). (5) Task requires `act-result.txt` generation, output validation, and exact-value assertions; workflow doesn't implement this. (6) Code lacks input validation (invalid dates, negative sizes, null fields). Source code itself is well-typed and organized, but deliverable is broken and incomplete.
